title: liege wie
description: Utility-Mod for sending an automated Chat-Message on sleeping. Inspired by BastiGHG's "liege wie"-insider.
body:
Simple utility mod for **customizable** automated sleep-messages. Inspired by **BastiGHG**'s "liege wie"-insider.

- Customizable in Chat Settings
- Up to 256 Characters
- Toggle ON / OFF

1. Turn liege-wie ON
2. Set custom message
3. sleep!

(Maybe upwards compatible)

GHG
